faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: Here are the most common questions about orders, delivery, payments, and returns. Did not find your answer? Contact us.

items.item1Question: How fast will my order arrive?
items.item1Answer: In Estonia, orders usually arrive within 1-3 business days. For Baltic countries it is typically 2-5 days, and for other EU countries delivery can take longer.
items.item2Answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available for some shipping methods. Availability depends on the selected carrier and region.
items.item3Question: What if my book is damaged?
items.item3Answer: Contact us within 48 hours after delivery and attach photos. We will offer a replacement or a refund.
items.item4Question: How can I cancel an order?
items.item4Answer: If your order has not shipped yet, support can cancel it immediately. If it has already shipped, we will help you arrange a return after delivery.
items.item5Answer: Yes, we ship across the Baltics, Finland, and other EU countries. Cost and delivery time depend on destination.
items.item6Question: How do I register on the site?
items.item6Answer: Click the sign in / sign up button and enter your email and password. After confirming your email, checkout becomes faster.
items.item7Answer: Yes, returns are possible within 14 days if the item remains in resale condition. Full details are on the returns page.
items.item8Question: How do I track my package?
items.item8Answer: After shipment, you will receive an email with a tracking number and link. If the email did not arrive, contact us and we will help.
items.item9Question: Can I change the delivery address after ordering?
items.item9Answer: Yes, if the order has not yet been handed to the carrier. Contact support as soon as possible and we will update it.
items.item10Answer: Yes, we regularly run promotions and special offers. Follow updates on the homepage and in our newsletter.
items.item11Answer: We usually respond within 1-3 hours during working time. During high load periods it may take a bit longer.

faqPage.ctaDescription: Our team will gladly help and suggest the best solution.

about.heroTitle: We create a place where finding a book feels effortless
about.heroDescription: RaamatuPood is an online bookstore for readers who value great selection, convenient service, and an atmosphere that keeps you coming back for your next story.
about.whoWeAreTitle: A bookstore with a human touch
about.whoWeAreParagraph1: We started RaamatuPood with a simple idea: buying a book online should feel as pleasant as visiting your favorite bookstore. That is why we combine a well-curated catalog, intuitive interface, and service that helps instead of complicating.
about.whoWeAreParagraph2: For us, every book is not just a product, but a chance to meet a new idea, emotion, or inspiration.
about.whyChooseUsTitle: Everything that matters for comfortable reading

whyChooseUs.item1Description: We help you quickly find a book by mood, topic, and interest, so you spend less time searching and more time reading.
whyChooseUs.item2Description: Our catalog is built around quality: bestsellers, strong classics, and worthy new releases without random entries.
whyChooseUs.item3Description: Transparent checkout, fast delivery, and support that gives practical answers and truly helps.
whyChooseUs.item4Description: From discovery to checkout, the interface is designed to keep you confident at every step.

about.missionTitle: Helping people read more with joy

values.item1: Reading should be accessible and inspiring every day.
values.item2: We value attention to detail: from book descriptions to service quality.
values.item3: Customer trust matters more than short-term campaigns and loud promises.

privacy.heroDescription: We treat your data with care and explain in plain language what we collect, why we collect it, and what rights you have.
privacy.introductionParagraph1: This policy describes how RaamatuPood collects and uses personal data when you use the site, your account, and order services. We follow principles of legality, transparency, data minimization, and security aligned with modern data protection standards, including core GDPR principles.
privacy.introductionParagraph2: By using the site, you confirm that you have read this policy. For some actions (such as marketing emails), we request separate consent, which you can withdraw at any time.

collectedData.item1: Contact details: name, email, phone number (if provided).
collectedData.item2: Order data: ordered books, delivery address, payment method, order status.
collectedData.item3: Account data: order history, favorites, reviews, and profile settings.
collectedData.item4: Technical data: IP address, device type, browser data, cookies, and on-site actions.

usageReasons.item4: Fraud prevention, account protection, and site stability.
usageReasons.item5: Compliance with legal and accounting obligations.

privacy.protectionParagraph1: We apply technical and organizational safeguards: access control, secure connections, suspicious activity monitoring, and limited employee access to personal data.
privacy.protectionParagraph2: Data is retained only as long as necessary for order fulfillment, account support, legal compliance, and dispute resolution. After that period, data is deleted or anonymized.
privacy.sharingIntro: We do not sell personal data. Sharing is possible only when necessary:
privacy.sharingItem1: Payment and logistics partners to process payments and deliveries.
privacy.sharingItem2: IT providers that maintain the site and infrastructure.
privacy.sharingItem3: Public authorities, when required by law.
privacy.sharingOutro: In all cases, we require our partners to maintain confidentiality and data protection standards.

userRights.item1: Receive a copy of the data we store about you.
userRights.item3: Delete your account and related data if no retention obligations apply.
userRights.item4: Restrict or object to data processing in specific cases.
userRights.item5: Withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time.

privacy.rightsDescription: To exercise your rights, contact us through the contacts page. We respond within a reasonable timeframe and may request identity verification to protect your account from unauthorized actions.
privacy.contactsDescription: If you have questions about privacy, data processing, or this policy, contact us:

delivery.heroDescription: We deliver books to your doorstep across Estonia and the EU with transparent pricing and clear timelines.
delivery.methodsDescription: Choose the shipping option that fits your speed and convenience.

methods.omnivaDescription: Parcel lockers all over Estonia. Convenient pickup any time.
methods.itellaDescription: SmartPOST parcel machines and pickup points with flexible delivery.
methods.courierDescription: To your door within 2-3 business days.
methods.pickupDescription: Free pickup at our Tallinn store.

faq.item1Question: How can I track my order?
faq.item1Answer: You will receive a tracking number by email once your order has been shipped.
faq.item2Answer: Yes, we ship to all EU countries. See the pricing table for details.
faq.item3Question: What if my package is damaged?
faq.item3Answer: Contact us within 14 days and we will send a replacement or issue a refund.

delivery.ctaDescription: Browse our catalog and find your next favorite book.
